# PDFBridge - Technical Overview (Settlement-First)

This document gives LLMs and agents accurate context for PDFBridge as it exists today.

## Core Identity
PDFBridge is invoice settlement infrastructure. We compile off-chain invoices into deterministic execution plans ("intents") and coordinate safe on-chain settlement on Solana with reconciliation and an auditable ledger.

## What The Public API Is For
- Accept an invoice (PDF/PNG/JPG) and extract normalized invoice data.
- Compile an intent (amount, currency, recipient/wallet, memo/anchor, governance flags).
- Broadcast settlement to Solana when allowed.
- Reconcile finality and persist a durable audit trail.
- Expose ledger + webhooks + API key management for integrators.

## What Is Not Public
Legacy URL/HTML-to-PDF rendering endpoints exist for internal TechhSpyder tools and are not part of the public API surface.

## Public API
Base URL: `https://api.pdfbridge.xyz/api/v1`
Authentication: `x-api-key: pk_live_...` or `pk_test_...`

### Compile Intent (Recommended Entry)
`POST /compiler/compile-intent`
- Accepts `multipart/form-data`
- Field: `file` (PDF/PNG/JPG)

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.pdfbridge.xyz/api/v1/compiler/compile-intent \
  -H "x-api-key: pk_test_your_key_here" \
  -F "file=@invoice.pdf"
```

### Broadcast
`POST /compiler/intent/:id/broadcast`

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.pdfbridge.xyz/api/v1/compiler/intent/INTENT_ID/broadcast \
  -H "x-api-key: pk_live_your_key_here"
```

### Reconcile
`GET /compiler/intent/:documentId/reconcile`

```bash
curl -X GET https://api.pdfbridge.xyz/api/v1/compiler/intent/DOCUMENT_ID/reconcile \
  -H "x-api-key: pk_live_your_key_here"
```

### Ledger
`GET /ledger`

```bash
curl -X GET "https://api.pdfbridge.xyz/api/v1/ledger?limit=10" \
  -H "x-api-key: pk_live_your_key_here"
```

## Threat Model Notes (High Level)
- Never execute unsafe invoices. If invariant checks fail, the system should refuse to broadcast.
- Duplicate-guard and reconciliation are designed to reduce double-payment risk.
- Public documentation should not include internal rendering endpoints.
